global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with engaging text elements promoting a binge-watching service.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to start binge-watching for free.

elements.label: BingeLayer UGC
elements.description: A bold, large text at the top of the ad, prominently displaying the brand name 'BingeLayer' with 'UGC' in a smaller font.

elements.label: Binge starts now
elements.description: A medium-sized text in the center, stating 'Binge starts now' in a clear, inviting font.

elements.label: Start free today
elements.description: A smaller text below the main body text, encouraging users to start for free, presented in a friendly font.

elements.label: Get offer
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Get offer' in a contrasting color to attract attention.
